name: parallel runner: receiving SIGTERM mid-run flushes already-completed file results to the reporter
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --concurrency 2 --pause-after-each-file 200 --format json 2>out.json & pid=$!; (sleep 1; kill -TERM $pid) & wait $pid 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const r=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));if(r.partial===true&&r.files.length>=1){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL\n");process.exit(1)}'
setup: mkdir -p src && for i in $(seq 1 20); do echo "eval($i);" > src/f${i}.js; done
